sys_update_version.name: sn_related_record_definition_6fddeb4fcf454bd88935fb251d851c51
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sn_related_record_definition"><sn_related_record_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><display_label>ITSM CHeck Results</display_label><internal_name>x_snc_airop.ITSM CHeck Results</internal_name><primary_table>x_snc_airop_check_result</primary_table><queries_from>x_snc_airop_check_result</queries_from><script><![CDATA[(function refineQuery(current, primary, secondary) {
     //Add your code here to addQuery on top of the 'Queries from'
     //Example:
         //Primary reference table is 'incident'; Secondary reference table is 'sys_user'; Queries from is 'incident'
         //Related record context Applies to table 'incident', Primary reference field  as 'sys_id', Secondary reference field as 'caller'
         //we want to show all other incidents from this caller
         current.addQuery('module', 'ITSM');
         //current.addQuery('sys_id', '!=', primary.sys_id)
})(current, primary, secondary);]]></script><secondary_table>x_snc_airop_assessment_run</secondary_table><sys_class_name>sn_related_record_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-29 07:25:43</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_id>6fddeb4fcf454bd88935fb251d851c51</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>ITSM CHeck Results</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sn_related_record_definition_6fddeb4fcf454bd88935fb251d851c51</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-29 07:26:52</sys_updated_on></sn_related_record_definition></record_update>
